message.content:
```json
{
  "skill_id": "macos_qqmusic_playback",
  "version": "1.0",
  "target_app": "com.tencent.QQMusicMac",
  "objective": "Activate playback of a specific track in QQ Music on macOS using black-box automation",
  "required_commands": [
    "debug.pressKey",
    "debug.pasteTextPreserveClipboard",
    "debug.findScreenText",
    "debug.clickScreenText",
    "debug.captureScreen",
    "debug.findImageText"
  ],
  "inputs": {
    "query": "aa",
    "visible_row_anchor": "Cure For Me"
  },
  "disturbance_policy": {
    "reveal_shortcut": "cmd+f",
    "reveal_settle_ms": 300,
    "submit_settle_ms": 900
  },
  "steps": [
    "Press reveal shortcut (cmd+f)",
    "Paste query with clipboard restore",
    "Submit return",
    "Dismiss overlay with escape",
    "OCR resolve visible row anchor",
    "Double-click OCR row anchor",
    "Capture screenshot evidence",
    "OCR verify playback title from captured evidence image"
  ],
  "verification": {
    "playback_title": "Cure For Me - AURORA"
  },
  "known_limits": [
    "Only validated for the specific query 'aa' and visible row anchor 'Cure For Me'",
    "Does not support generalized playback for arbitrary rows",
    "Does not support pointer-free playback activation",
    "Chinese OCR anchor stability is not claimed"
  ]
}
```
